questions.question: What winter sport or activity are the people participating in?
questions.answer_key: Sledding or snow tubing down an inflatable slope
questions.rationale: Core activity is invisible without AD; defines entire scene purpose

questions.question: Describe the structure people are using to slide down.
questions.answer_key: A large inflatable tube slide with blue and white striped sections
questions.rationale: Main object in scene; essential for understanding the activity setup

questions.question: What happens to the person in the red hat during the sequence?
questions.answer_key: They slide down the slope and reach the bottom of the inflatable slide
questions.rationale: High-need window (11.9–14.9s); tracks main subject's progression through activity

questions.question: How many people are visible actively sledding or waiting to sled?
questions.answer_key: At least three people; one sliding, others at top or bottom of slope
questions.rationale: Helps listener understand social context and activity flow

questions.question: What is the ground surface covered with throughout the scene?
questions.answer_key: Snow; the entire slope and surrounding area are snow-covered
questions.rationale: Establishes season and environmental context for the activity
